it:7.3: "Sabbaṁ, bhikkhave, anabhijānaṁ aparijānaṁ tattha cittaṁ avirājayaṁ appajahaṁ abhabbo dukkhakkhayāya. Sabbañca kho, bhikkhave, abhijānaṁ parijānaṁ tattha cittaṁ virājayaṁ pajahaṁ bhabbo dukkhakkhayāyā"ti. Etamatthaṁ bhagavā avoca. Tatthetaṁ iti vuccati:
it:7.4:
"Yo sabbaṁ sabbato ñatvā,
sabbatthesu na rajjati;
Sa ve sabbapariññā so,
sabbadukkhamupaccagā"ti.
it:7.5:
Ayampi attho vutto bhagavatā, iti me sutanti.
Sattamaṁ.
